mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_BACKUP_MONTH_RECORD (MR_ID, MR_USER_ID, MR_BOOK_ID, MR_YEAR, MR_MONTH, MR_TOTAL_ASSET, MR_TOTAL_LIABILITY, MR_NET_ASSET, MR_MONTH_ON_MONTH, MR_YEAR_ON_YEAR, MR_NOTE, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED) SELECT MR_ID, MR_USER_ID, MR_BOOK_ID, MR_YEAR, MR_MONTH, MR_TOTAL_ASSET, MR_TOTAL_LIABILITY, MR_NET_ASSET, MR_MONTH_ON_MONTH, MR_YEAR_ON_YEAR, MR_NOTE, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED FROM FIN_MONTH_RECORD WHERE MR_BOOK_ID = #{bookId} AND MR_IS_DELETED = 0
